title: Fossils And Archeology: Jurassic Park
description: This Resource pack aims to bring the Dinosaurs from the Jurassic Park (1993) to the Fossils & Archeology: Revival Genesis mod.
body:
"Welcome...to Jurassic Park"
==========================================================================
This Resource pack aims to bring the Dinosaurs from the Jurassic Park (1993) to the Fossils & Archeology: Revival Genesis mod.

If you use this texture in a youtube video, id love for you to leave the link for it in the description :)

The roaster:

Brachiosaurus
Raptors (Deinonychus)
Gallimimus
Parasaurolophus
Triceratops
Tyranosaurus rex

Some animals have their Male variants based on future appearances in the franchise or concept and fan arts.

In a future update i may add Dilophosaurus.
==========================================================================

All rights to Universal Studios and The F/A dev team.

The Fossils And Archeology: Jurassic Park Pack Team
